docs.title: MEDHIRA
docs.text:
Engineering Intelligence Across Everything

Welcome to MEDHIRA — a community-driven organization delivering production-ready open-source libraries trusted by developers worldwide.

docs.title: Trending Packages
docs.text:
Discover the most popular packages from our community:

agloom

The intelligent fabric for AI agents. 9 execution patterns, auto-classification, self-learning. Drop-in replacement for LangChain's create_agent with superpowers. :package: PyPI · :books: Docs

agsuperbrain

Local multimodal graph-intelligence system. 71x more token-efficient than Graphify. Hybrid retriever + optional local LLM. :package: PyPI · :books: Docs

@medhira/react-native-responsive-screen

Responsive screen utilities for React Native apps :package: NPM · 12.4K+ weekly downloads

@medhira/rn-otp-textInput

OTP/PIN input component with validation :package: NPM · 8.7K+ weekly downloads

@medhira/rn-typescript-hooks

TypeScript validation hooks for React Native :package: NPM · 6.2K+ weekly downloads

@medhira/rn-expo-json-ui-engine

JSON-based UI engine for Expo :package: NPM · 5.1K+ weekly downloads

@medhira/otp-utils

OTP generation and validation utilities :package: NPM · 4.8K+ weekly downloads

@medhira/ajv-utils

Ajv schema validation utilities :package: NPM · 3.9K+ weekly downloads

medhira-playwright-crawl

Async Playwright-powered web crawler :package: PyPI · 2.1K+ weekly downloads

docs.title: JavaScript/TypeScript Packages
docs.text: MEDHIRA provides essential JavaScript and TypeScript libraries for various development needs.

docs.text:
• medhira-expo-persist-secure-store - Secure storage for Expo apps
  • medhira-rn-expo-json-ui-engine - JSON-based UI engine for Expo

docs.title: React
docs.text: • medhira-react-typescript-hooks - Custom React hooks with full TypeScript support

docs.title: Utilities
docs.text:
• medhira-ajv-utils - Ajv validation utilities
  • medhira-concurrency-utils - Async concurrency utilities
  • medhira-eslint-rules - Custom ESLint rules
  • medhira-jst-functions - JavaScript utility functions
  • medhira-mongoose-utils - Mongoose database utilities
  • medhira-otp-utils - OTP generation and validation

docs.title: Python Packages
docs.text: MEDHIRA provides Python packages for various development needs.

docs.title: medhira-playwright-crawl
docs.text:
An async, Playwright-powered web crawler for crawling and scraping web pages.

bash pip install medhira-playwright-crawl

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: bash medhira-playwright-crawl https://example.com

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Async crawling with asyncio
  • Playwright browser automation
  • Screenshot capture
  • Link extraction
  • Text extraction
  • Token and word counting

docs.title: More Information
docs.text:
• GitHub
  • PyPI

docs.title: React Native Packages
docs.text: MEDHIRA provides several React Native packages for building mobile applications.

docs.title: medhira-react-native-responsive-screen
docs.text:
Responsive screen utilities for React Native - helps build responsive layouts that work across different screen sizes.

bash npm install medhira-react-native-responsive-screen

docs.title: medhira-rn-otp-textInput
docs.text:
OTP/PIN text input component for React Native - provides secure OTP input fields.

bash npm install medhira-rn-otp-textinput

docs.title: medhira-rn-styles-cache
docs.text:
Style caching with LRU for React Native - improves performance by caching style objects.

bash npm install medhira-rn-styles-cache

docs.title: medhira-rn-typescript-hooks
docs.text:
TypeScript validation hooks for React Native forms.

bash npm install medhira-rn-typescript-hooks

docs.title: More Information
docs.text:
Each package has its own documentation on GitHub and npm.
